description: Reference guide for interpreting AlphaFold confidence metrics.

very_high.meaning: High backbone accuracy, reliable side-chain placement

confident.meaning: Good backbone prediction, side-chains less certain

low.meaning: Caution, treat as a rough guide only

pae.interpretation: Lower is better. PAE[i][j] is the expected error in position of residue j when aligned on residue i. Low PAE between two regions means their relative orientation is well-predicted.

ptm.interpretation: Global fold confidence. >0.8 indicates a confident overall fold prediction.

iptm.interpretation: Confidence in predicted inter-chain interfaces (multimer only). >0.8 indicates confident interface prediction.

ranking_confidence.interpretation: Used to rank models. Higher is better.
